general.name: Zoom Plist
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>A17F5376-1A3F-41C4-B1D6-3D884C0D7037</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>A17F5376-1A3F-41C4-B1D6-3D884C0D7037</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Zoom Plist </string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5AB96B1D-E159-4123-8ED9-82FD575E7730</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5AB96B1D-E159-4123-8ED9-82FD575E7730</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>us.zoom.config</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>AU2_EnableAutoUpdate</key><true/><key>AU2_EnableShowZoomUpdates </key><true/><key>AU2_EnableUpdateAvailableBanner</key><true/><key>AU2_InstallAtIdleTime</key><true/><key>AU2_SetUpdateChannel</key><string>0</string><key>DisableLoginWithEmail</key><false/><key>EnableAppleLogin</key><false/><key>NoFacebook</key><true/><key>ZAutoSSOLogin</key><false/></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
